introSection: Kombo is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Indianapolis Zoo in Indianapolis, Indiana, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In November 2025, the zoo confirmed that the roller coaster would be removed in early 2026.

fullText:
Kombo is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Indianapolis Zoo in Indianapolis, Indiana, USA.

In November 2025, the zoo confirmed that the roller coaster would be removed in early 2026.



Pale chartreuse track and supports.
